description_cn:
重新划分网格的边长取决于输入网格的顶点颜色。

根据网格的颜色重新划分生成新的网格。颜色越黑的部分生成的网格边长越小，网格也就越密且越平滑；越白的部分生成的网格边长越大，网格也就越疏且越不平整。

当网格只有一种颜色的时候，则生成均匀分布的网格。可以用作将网格重新生成三角形网格。

长度间隔区间则是网格颜色从黑到白对应生成的网格边长的范围。
description_en:
New grids are generated by re-dividing the existing grid based on its color.

Darker areas generate grids with smaller side lengths, resulting in denser and smoother grids; lighter areas generate grids with larger side lengths, resulting in sparser and less smooth grids. When the mesh has only one color, a uniformly distributed mesh is generated.

This can be used to regenerate a triangular mesh. The length interval range is the range of grid side lengths corresponding to the grid colors from black to white.

parameters.name: LengthInterval
parameters.desc_en: Edge length interval from black to white

parameters.name: FixC
parameters.desc_cn: 在重新划分网格时将保持锐利的曲线。可以是边界曲线或内部曲线。
parameters.desc_en: Curves which will be kept sharp during remeshing. Can be boundary or internal curves

parameters.name: FixV
parameters.desc_cn: 重新定格时要固定的点
parameters.desc_en: Points to keep fixed during remeshing

parameters.name: Flip
parameters.desc_cn: 用于决定何时翻转边的标准（0 表示基于价键，1 表示基于角度）
parameters.desc_en: Criterion used to decide when to flip edges (0 for valence based, 1 for angle based)

parameters.name: Reset
parameters.desc_cn: 初始化为True，运行重新剖析为False。连接计时器以进行连续刷新。
parameters.desc_en: True to initialize, false to run remeshing. Connect a timer for continuous remeshing

author: Kangaroo Team
